citations.text: AI4K12 Initiative (2020-2022). Five Big Ideas in Artificial Intelligence, Grade Band Progression Charts. A joint project of AAAI and CSTA, funded by NSF award DRL-1846073.

statement.en: Most computers have no sense of taste, smell, or touch, but they can sense some things that humans can't, such as infrared emissions, extremely low or high frequency sounds, or magnetism.
